column1: message

Our 2026 roadmap is live. The central thesis: billions of AI agents are coming, and every one of them will need a trust layer to operate. We believe VeChain is that layer. Four pillars. One clear direction. What's your first reaction?

100+ enterprise use cases. 5.3M VeBetter users. 50M+ verified sustainable actions. Ten years of the same thesis, proven step by step. Chapter 4 is where everything compounds. What part of the journey has meant the most to you?

Value creation has always had two actors: individuals and businesses. A third has arrived — the AI agent. It can reason, act, and transact around the clock, on behalf of people and companies alike. Do you think trust infrastructure for agents is the defining challenge of the next decade?

One challenge holds back AI adoption more than any other: trust. How do you verify an agent's identity? Confirm an action was actually executed? We have spent ten years building the infrastructure to answer these questions. What's your biggest concern about AI agents acting on your behalf?

We are upgrading VeChainThor for the agentic economy — full EVM equivalence, on-chain agent identity, MCP integration, and credibility scoring. This is the trust infrastructure agents need, built on ten years of real-world deployment. Which of these upgrades excites you most?

Interstellar is the third and final phase of VeChain Renaissance. Full EVM equivalence. JSON-RPC compatibility. Transaction finality upgrades. On-chain RWA attestation. We are opening VeChainThor to the wider crypto industry. What does this open up for you?

Full EVM equivalence means Hardhat, Foundry, MetaMask, and Ethers.js all work natively on VeChainThor. No custom adapters. No relearning. If you are an Ethereum developer, the door is open. What would you build first?

For enterprises and autonomous agents, deterministic settlement is not a nice-to-have — it is the foundation of reliable operations. Our committee-based validation upgrade delivers exactly that. Why do you think finality matters more for agents than for traditional applications?

The RWA tokenization market is projected to reach $16 trillion by 2030. On-chain attestation is the missing piece: cryptographic proof that a tokenized asset corresponds to something real. We are building it into VeChainThor with Interstellar. What real-world asset would you most want to see tokenized?

EVM equivalence, JSON-RPC compatibility, and on-chain agent tooling mean the barrier to building on VeChainThor has never been lower. The door is open wider than ever. What has been the biggest barrier to building on VeChain for you?

MCP On-Chain is the connective tissue between the agentic world and our trust layer. AI agents can read on-chain state, initiate transactions, and query smart contracts — all within a configurable, permissioned framework. What kinds of agents do you think will use this first?

Every agent on VeChainThor will carry a verifiable on-chain identity. Our credibility scoring system tracks behavior over time — reliable agents build reputation, unreliable ones get flagged. How important is on-chain reputation to you when deciding whether to trust an AI agent?

SDK v3 ships with overhauled reliability, usability, and agent compatibility. Built for human developers and AI builders alike. If you have built on VeChain before, what would you most want to see improved in the developer experience?

We are rebuilding our explorer from the ground up — integrated analytics, exchange data, DeFi TVL, staking TVL, and VeBetter app-level activity, all in one view. What data do you find yourself searching for most often?

As our ecosystem grows toward hundreds of dApps and thousands of autonomous agents, fast and reliable data retrieval becomes critical. We are deploying purpose-built indexer infrastructure to support that scale. What does a healthy, high-scale VeChain ecosystem look like to you?

5.3 million users. 50+ live apps. 50M+ verified sustainable actions. VeBetter is the world's largest blockchain-based sustainability platform — and our first proof that AI and blockchain can run as a complete, functioning system. Which VeBetter app has had the biggest impact on your daily habits?

B3MO started as our VeBetter mascot. In 2026, it evolves into a full AI coordination and intelligence layer — automating ecosystem processes, surfacing insights, and becoming one of the first agents on the TRUST Marketplace. What do you want B3MO to help you with?

B3MO Community Quests are coming to VeBetter: structured, incentivised activity across our ecosystem designed to drive cross-app discovery and sustained engagement. What kind of quests would get you the most involved?

A DAO is only as strong as the community operating it. Our roadmap commits to continuous UX and governance refinements with one goal: increase participation and retention. What would make you more active in VeBetterDAO governance?

Our flywheel: VeBetter apps reward real-world sustainable actions with B3TR, verified on-chain. Users earn. Apps grow. The ecosystem compounds. 50M+ actions verified to date. What sustainable action do you most want to see rewarded on VeBetter?

We launched StarGate alongside Hayabusa in December 2025. In three months, total VET staked grew from 2.52 billion to 13 billion tokens. That is a community placing a direct bet on VeChainThor's future. Are you staking? What made you decide to?

From 2.52 billion to 13 billion VET staked in just three months. That level of community conviction sends a clear signal. What does staking mean to you — rewards, governance, or something else entirely?

Hayabusa was the most significant protocol upgrade in our history. In December 2025, KYC-gated Proof of Authority became public Delegated Proof of Stake. No technical issues. The network transitioned and the community followed. How has DPoS changed how you engage with VeChain?

Interstellar adds new delegation controls for validators — more configurability, better economic alignment, and a more diverse, resilient validator set. We want validators with genuine skin in the game. What does a healthy validator ecosystem look like to you?

Since Hayabusa, anyone can earn protocol rewards by securing VeChainThor through an active stake. 13 billion VET staked in three months. Our delegator mechanic is working exactly as designed. What questions do you have about staking or delegation?

The TRUST Agent Marketplace is the crown jewel of our 2026 roadmap. Find, hire, and trust a specialized AI agent — with identity verification, credibility scoring, and transparent track records, all on VeChainThor. What kind of agent would you hire first?

Build an agent. List it. Get paid when it is hired. We provide the identity, credibility scoring, and payment rails. VeBetter apps are the first agents on the platform. If you are a developer, what would your first agent do?

Every agent on VeChainThor earns a credibility score based on its on-chain track record. Reliable agents build reputation. Unreliable ones get flagged. Users see the record before they engage. Would you trust an agent more if you could see its full on-chain history?

B3MO will be one of the first agents listed on the TRUST Marketplace — with a verified track record, an established community, and a clear purpose: pay humans for making the world better. What's the first task you'd give B3MO?

The TRUST Marketplace creates a new economic model for AI builders. Build a specialized agent, list it, and earn from every hire. We handle identity, credibility, and payment. What niche would you build an agent for?

Social login in VeWorld removes the most common barrier to Web3 adoption: the seed phrase. Sign in with Google or Apple — your wallet, your assets, no cryptographic overhead. Who in your life would finally try Web3 with an onramp like this?

We are bridging VeChainThor to Ethereum and EVM-compatible chains via VeWorld — stablecoins, liquidity, and new user communities. Our trust technologies, accessible across the wider crypto ecosystem. Which chains matter most to you?

A nutritionist in Tokyo builds an AI agent. She should not need to understand private key management to get paid. Our expanded custodial services abstract the crypto layer so anyone can benefit from blockchain-powered payments. What use case does this unlock for you?

We are launching a new RWA platform on VeChain — tokenized real-world assets, supported natively in VeWorld, with a full framework for issuance, compliance, and custody. Which real-world asset class do you think will tokenize fastest?

Earning B3TR for sustainable actions means more when you can convert those rewards to the currency your landlord accepts. We are bringing new fiat on and off-ramps to VeWorld, along with agentic payment integrations. What payment integration would change things for you?

The global economy is reorganising around three forces: individuals who bring creativity, businesses that bring capital, and AI agents that bring scale. All three need a trust layer to interact. Do you see yourself as part of this tripartite economy already?

AI is the technology of productivity. Blockchain is the technology of trust. Together, they form the infrastructure layer of tomorrow. Our roadmap builds both sides simultaneously. Which side — AI or blockchain — do you think is more underappreciated right now?

100+ enterprise use cases. 5.3M VeBetter users. 13B VET staked. 50M+ verified actions. Ten years. One thesis: blockchain creates real economic value. Chapter 4 is where it all compounds. What is the single achievement from the last decade you are most proud of?
Interstellar. MCP On-Chain. SDK v3. TRUST Agent Marketplace. RWA Platform. B3MO Agent. More details are coming in the weeks ahead. Which of these are you most excited to hear more about?

Ten years of building has brought us here. The agentic economy, the TRUST Marketplace, VeBetter at scale. This fourth chapter belongs to our community as much as our team. What do you want to contribute to it?
